text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Bamboo Memory and Yaeno Muteki while
I'm walking by the river one day.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Okay! Are you ready, Yaeno?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes! Come at me however you want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory takes her bamboo blade in
hand... and holds it ready above her head! Could
this be a duel?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: KIYAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HYAH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Was that an unarmed technique?! That was
amazing! Absolutely incredible!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Yaeno and I are just doing some
martial arts training!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
She spars with me like this every so often! Kendo
really keeps you sharp and on your toes!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's right. And because we've both been
practicing martial arts since we were young, we
have a lot in common.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I consider Bamboo a close friend. When we train
together, I feel we really embody the meaning of
the phrase, "birds of a feather."

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We're like two feathers in a pod! Right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo's blunder aside, I decide to watch them
as they practice. After some time, just as we're
about to leave...

text_block_list.name: Kitten
text_block_list.text: Meow. Meooow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We follow the sound to a kitten pacing in front of
a small waterway. It seems unable to commit to a
course of action.
choice_data_list: Does it want to jump across?
Does it want to jump across?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Th-that's not safe! What if it falls in?! It
could drown! I'll save y—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No! Don't touch it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo?! But why not?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Look at the other side. See that other cat? It's
been keeping watch for a while now.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That must be its mother. She's already crossed,
and now she's trying to teach her kitten how to
jump.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If we get in the way, the kitten won't learn an
important skill it needs to survive! The best thing
to do is to suck it up, stay back, and watch.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
B-but... even so, shouldn't we get them to
practice somewhere a bit more safe?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This is the challenge the cat gave its kitten. I
believe the kitten will overcome this obstacle and
grow from it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Besides... even if it doesn't work out, there's
nothing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We're watching, after all! It's not like we're not
going to save it if it does happen to fall in!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Uuuugh! F-fine! I get it! It's tearing me up inside...
but I believe the kitten can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kitten successfully leaps over the water and
reunites with its mother!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Thank goodness! And look how proud the
kitten looks! It's so precious!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You were right. The best thing to do was to just
keep an eye on them... Your intuition is truly
admirable.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I don't know about all that... When I was growing
up, my mom used to tell me all kinds of stories
with lessons in them—things like how it's not
always best to do everything for someone!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
How'd it go again? Um... "Teach a fish to cook,
and it'll eat forever."
...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The saying isn't quite right, but her judgment
does seem to have helped the kitten get one step
closer to independence.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we take this chance to play with the
cats a bit?

Why don't we take this chance to play with the
cats a bit?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The saying isn't quite right, but her judgment
does seem to have helped the kitten get one step
closer to independence.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we take this chance to play with the
cats a bit?

Why don't we take this chance to play with the
cats a bit?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It did great! That gap is twice its size! I could
learn a thing or two!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's it! We should follow the kitten's example
and take on a huge challenge! How about we
climb up that pillar we saw earlier at the bridge?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We need to become braver as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, it was nice to observe the differences
between these two fairly similar Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Good thinking! Do we have anything that might
work as a cat toy?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh! The mother cat is grooming the kitten! It's
like she's saying, "Good job!" Oooh! I just want to
protect the both of them!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Earth to Yaeno! Are you listening? You're getting
all mother hen on us again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, it was nice to observe the differences
between these two kindred spirits.
